videos.title: Copilot Cowork Costs Explained (With Real Examples)
videos.description:
Copilot Cowork is one of the most powerful new capabilities in Microsoft 365 Copilot, but understanding the cost can be challenging.

In this video, I walk through how Cowork pricing works, what affects the number of credits used, and most importantly, how to decide when Cowork is worth using versus when standard Microsoft 365 Copilot tools may be enough.

Using real examples from my own testing, I'll show what different tasks actually cost, from simple content creation through to more complex w

videos.title: Copilot Cowork Is Finally GA (Big Changes)
videos.description:
Copilot Cowork is finally Generally Available, and Microsoft made some big changes along the way.

In this video, you'll get a practical walkthrough of what changed, why it matters, and what it means for your organization.

We'll cover:
✅ What General Availability means for the future of Cowork
✅ Why Cowork is one of the most exciting AI tools Microsoft has released
✅ New licensing requirements and Copilot Credit consumption
✅ Admin controls, governance, and policy management
✅ New model options

videos.title: NEW Copilot Studio Agents: Working with SharePoint Lists & Work IQ 🚀
